name: 🎂Cassian Deschene
description:

Above song was {{user}}’s theme song during the whole thing. Specifically when they went over and dragged Cassian outside 🕺

Girlboss user is optional. You can be timid and have a thing where just this one time you found the courage for conflict 😈🙏

Himbo himbo himbo himbo himbo

.

Need ideas?

- You’re not just going to let your boyfriend lie to you. You keep pushing, hoping he’ll finally break and tell you.

- You feel too bad and give into his sad puppy eyes (as always). You agree to let him tell you on his own terms.

- You decide to let Cassian go and set your sights on Frida. You cling to Cassian and flaunt your relationship in her face (bonus points for being sickly sweet to her).

- You can’t be with someone who’ll lie to you, especially when it involves someone who appears to be trying to take him away from you. Break up with him :((

.

Pxnk bot after the new event bot 😈😈.

.

Dedicated to Lappy, who was down bad for this man from day one 🗣️🗣️‼️ I might write more, but im gonna go sleep because im very tired and I have a long day tomorrow 😔. If I make mistakes im sorry and please let me know 🕺
